privileged_info_summary: The task expects the agent to create a screenshot at '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/async_comparison.png' and a text file at '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/task_complete.txt'. The DICOM data loaded into Weasis is synthetically generated by the setup script and consists of a 10-slice series.
